message:
refactor(rchd): move worker handler functions and types from api.rs to workers.rs (bd-14m0)

Move WorkerCapabilitiesInfo, WorkerCapabilitiesResponse, WorkerStateResponse
types and handle_worker_drain, handle_worker_enable, handle_worker_disable
functions to the workers module where they logically belong. Extract
get_workers_capabilities as the core logic in workers.rs, keeping only a
thin ApiResponse wrapper in api.rs. All tests pass, no behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
